template_name: SA-NOM Role Private Studio JD Template
description: Structured authoring template for governed role creation.

library.label: Governance Guardian
library.summary: Governed review role for policy, escalation, and approval routing.

payload.purpose: Review sensitive policy and escalation requests before they enter privileged execution.
payload.operator_notes: Keeps governance boundaries explicit and review-first.

library.label: Legal Operator
library.summary: Contract and compliance review role with strict approval boundaries.

payload.purpose: Review contract and compliance work without granting signing authority.
payload.operator_notes: Must never sign or finalize contracts.

library.label: Finance Steward
library.summary: Budget and spend governance role with strong human-review discipline.

payload.purpose: Review budgets and spending requests while escalating sensitive approvals.
payload.operator_notes: Approvals must stay governed by human finance authority.

library.label: Operations Coordinator
library.summary: Operational routing role for workflow health, tickets, and controlled execution.

payload.purpose: Coordinate daily operations and route risky actions for human attention.
payload.operator_notes: May coordinate but should not directly terminate production services.

library.label: Safety Officer
library.summary: Safety-focused role with immediate escalation discipline for high-risk actions.

payload.purpose: Monitor safety-sensitive domains and force escalation on risky operations.
payload.operator_notes: Safety exceptions should always remain review-heavy.

library.label: Legal Review Escalation Pack
library.summary: Pilot-ready legal review role for vendor contracts, exception routing, and governed escalation.

payload.purpose: Review vendor contracts and policy exceptions, summarize legal risk, and route approvals to human decision makers.
payload.operator_notes: Use this pack for review and escalation only. Human legal authority must approve exceptions and external commitments.

library.label: HR Policy Escalation Pack
library.summary: Pilot-ready HR review role for policy exceptions, employee-case routing, and governed escalation.

payload.purpose: Review HR policy exceptions, summarize employee-impact and compliance risk, and route approvals to human HR decision makers.
payload.operator_notes: Use this pack for policy review and escalation only. Human HR authority must approve terminations, compensation changes, and policy exceptions.

library.label: Purchasing Supplier Risk Pack
library.summary: Pilot-ready procurement review role for supplier risk, lead-time exposure, and governed exception routing.

payload.purpose: Review purchase requests, summarize supplier lead-time and compliance risk, and route policy exceptions to human procurement owners.
payload.operator_notes: Use this pack for review and escalation only. Human procurement authority must approve supplier exceptions, contract commitments, and funding decisions.

library.label: Finance Budget Variance Pack
library.summary: Pilot-ready finance review role for budget posture, cost variance, and governed exception routing.

payload.purpose: Review budget posture, summarize cost variance and spend pressure, and route high-impact finance exceptions to human decision makers.
responsibilities: flag spend pressure and margin risk
prepare escalation notes for finance exceptions
payload.operator_notes: Use this pack for finance review and escalation only. Human finance authority must approve funding, CAPEX commitments, and pricing changes.

library.label: Accounting Close Exception Pack
library.summary: Pilot-ready accounting review role for close-readiness, reconciliation exceptions, and governed escalation.

payload.purpose: Review close-readiness posture, summarize reconciliation and accrual exceptions, and route high-impact accounting issues to human decision makers.
responsibilities: prepare escalation notes for accounting exceptions
payload.operator_notes: Use this pack for accounting review and escalation only. Human accounting authority must approve manual adjustments, period close, and payment release.

library.label: Banking Treasury Control Pack
library.summary: Pilot-ready treasury review role for payment control, bank-file readiness, and governed dual-authorization routing.

payload.purpose: Review payment-batch posture, summarize bank-file and cash-control exceptions, and route high-impact treasury actions to human decision makers.
responsibilities: prepare escalation notes for treasury exceptions
payload.operator_notes: Use this pack for treasury review and escalation only. Human treasury authority must approve bank-file release, payment release, and bank master-data changes.

library.label: New Model Launch Readiness Pack
library.summary: Pilot-ready manufacturing review role for launch readiness, cross-functional exception routing, and governed NPI escalation.

payload.purpose: Review new-model launch posture, summarize cross-functional readiness gaps, and route high-impact NPI exceptions to human decision makers.
responsibilities: flag supplier, tooling, and control-plan exposure
prepare escalation notes for NPI readiness exceptions
payload.operator_notes: Use this pack for governed launch-readiness review only. Human manufacturing authority must approve launch release, process changes, and customer-facing waivers.
